architecture.summary: Add UNKNOWN status to RepoHealthResult union. Badge hides (returns null) for UNKNOWN. No new components -- changes contained to existing checker, store, badge, page.tsx, and eval-store.

integrations.summary: GitHub REST API only. Only 404 = OFFLINE; all other non-ok responses (403, 429, 5xx) and network errors = UNKNOWN. No new external integrations.

ui-ux.summary: UNKNOWN badge hidden entirely. Eval verdict chip maps all 5 EvalVerdict values to distinct colors. lastEvalAt shown as relative time inline after run count.

performance.summary: UNKNOWN uses same 5-min TTL as OFFLINE for quick retry. No additional rate-limit mitigation needed.

security.summary: N/A - bug fix only. No auth or permission changes. Token fallback to unauthenticated acceptable (UNKNOWN instead of false OFFLINE).

edge-cases.summary: eval-store DB update awaited instead of fire-and-forget to prevent stale data. KV write remains fire-and-forget (non-critical hot cache).
